title: Support constraint_mode() on static constraints (#7027)
body:
## Summary
Implement `constraint_mode()` support for static constraints per IEEE 1800-2017 §18.8.
Static constraint mode state is now shared across all instances of a class.

## Issue
Fixes #7027

## Changes
- Remove `E_UNSUPPORTED` errors for `constraint_mode()` on static constraints
- Add `createStaticModeVar()` to create `STATIC_EXPLICIT` lifetime variables moved to class package by V3Class
- Separate index counters for static vs non-static constraints
- Add lazy initialization for static constraint mode (shared across instances)
- Update `makeModeAssignLhs()` to use `AstVarRef` for static vars (resolved by V3Scope)
- Update `wrapIfConstraintMode()` to select correct mode variable

## Test
- Added `test_regress/t/t_constraint_mode_static.{v,py}` — verifies cross-instance sharing, enable/disable, and randomization behavior
- Removed `test_regress/t/t_constraint_mode_unsup.{v,py,out}` — no longer unsupported


Written by claude code and planv tech.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
